name: Basic Query Validation
description: Actor accepts input, validates query length, and begins research with quick mode

input.query: What are the latest developments in quantum computing?

name: Standard Depth Research
description: Actor performs standard depth research, decomposes query into multiple sub-queries

input.query: How does machine learning differ from traditional programming approaches?

name: Deep Research Mode
description: Actor performs comprehensive research, creates detailed sub-query breakdown

input.query: What are the environmental impacts of renewable energy adoption worldwide?

name: Query Sanitization
description: Query is sanitized (excessive whitespace removed), research proceeds normally

input.query: What   is   artificial   intelligence?

name: Content Extraction
description: Actor fetches content from search results, processes HTML/text, extracts meaningful chunks

input.query: What are the health benefits of regular exercise?

name: Authority Source Prioritization
description: Academic sources (.edu, .org) are scored higher, ranked near top of results

input.query: What are the latest findings in climate change research?

name: Recency Scoring
description: Recent sources (2024-2025) are prioritized over older content

input.query: What are the latest developments in AI in 2025?

name: Research Planning
description: Actor creates initial research plan with goals, milestones, and estimated searches

input.query: What are the pros and cons of remote work?

name: Gap Detection & Adaptive Research
description: Actor detects knowledge gaps, continues research adaptively until coverage is sufficient

input.query: How do different programming languages compare in terms of performance and ease of use?

name: Early Completion
description: Actor detects sufficient coverage early, completes research before max_searches limit

input.query: What is Python programming?

name: Markdown Report
description: Report generated in markdown format with inline citations and bibliography

input.query: What are the key features of TypeScript?

name: HTML Report
description: Report generated in HTML format with styled citations and bibliography

input.query: What are the benefits of cloud computing?

name: JSON Report
description: Report generated in structured JSON format with citations array and metadata

input.query: What is the history of the internet?

name: APA Citation Style
description: Bibliography formatted in APA style with proper author-date citations

input.query: What are the effects of social media on mental health?

name: Quick Mode Cost Tracking
description: Actor tracks costs, stays within budget, provides cost breakdown in results

input.query: What is React?

name: Budget Enforcement
description: Actor stops research when budget limit reached, reports budget exceeded

input.query: What are the comprehensive impacts of artificial intelligence on society?

name: Cost Breakdown
description: Results include detailed cost breakdown: LLM calls, search API calls, content fetching

input.query: What are the latest trends in web development?

name: Cache Hit (Repeat Query)
description: Second run uses cached results, faster execution, cache statistics show hits

input.query: What is machine learning?

name: Similar Query Detection
description: Actor detects similarity, reuses relevant cached content, improves performance

input.query: What is artificial intelligence?

name: Cache Statistics
description: Results include cache statistics: hit rate, miss rate, performance improvement

name: Progress Tracking
description: Actor emits progress events throughout execution (0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)

name: Webhook Notifications
description: Webhook receives progress updates and completion notification with full results

input.query: What is the history of photography?

name: Status Events
description: Status events emitted for major milestones: Query decomposed, Searching sources, Analyzing content, Generating report

name: Multiple Citation Styles - APA
description: Citations formatted in APA style, bibliography includes proper formatting

name: MLA Citation Style
description: Citations formatted in MLA style with Works Cited section

name: Source Verification
description: Academic sources (.edu) and fact-check sites verified, quality scores included

name: Citation Coverage
description: Report includes citation coverage analysis: percentage of claims supported, unsupported claims identified
